name: FAI_SAM_RAW_HDL
description: This table holds the raw loader data

columns.Name: RAW_HDL_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key HDL Raw Process Table

columns.Name: DAY
columns.Comments: Day of the process in Raw HDL Table

columns.Name: PROCESS_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the Process in Raw HDL Table

columns.Name: KEY
columns.Comments: Key of the ESS in Raw HDL Table

columns.Name: THREAD_COUNT_IMPORT
columns.Comments: Thread count for the File import in Raw HDL Table

columns.Name: THREAD_COUNT_LOAD
columns.Comments: Thread count for the load file in Raw HDL Table

columns.Name: LOAD_IMPORT
columns.Comments: Number of Record during import in Raw HDL Table

columns.Name: LOAD_LINE
columns.Comments: Number of Line Records in Raw HDL Table

columns.Name: LOAD_SUCCESS
columns.Comments: Number of record successfully uploaded

columns.Name: PROCESSING_TIME
columns.Comments: Time of the Processing in Raw HDL Table

columns.Name: ID_METRIC
columns.Comments: Request Id of the Process in Raw HDL Table

columns.Name: UCM_ID
columns.Comments: Id Reference to the metadata in Raw HDL Table

columns.Name: CHUNK
columns.Comments: Chunk used on the process in Raw HDL Table

columns.Name: LOAD_LINE_IN_ERROR
columns.Comments: Number of Record in Error during the line load

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: Start Time of the Process in Raw HDL Table

columns.Name: STOP_TIME
columns.Comments: Stop Time of the Process in Raw HDL Table

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES TABLE

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
